# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Display name for the service principal."
      }
    },
    "subscriptionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().subscriptionId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Target subscription ID for the role assignment."
      }
    },
    "roleDefinitionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Contributor role definition ID."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "spObjectId": "[guid(parameters('servicePrincipalName'), parameters('subscriptionId'))]",
    "roleAssignmentName": "[guid(parameters('subscriptionId'), parameters('servicePrincipalName'), parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('roleAssignmentName')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]",
        "principalId": "[variables('spObjectId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "servicePrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('spObjectId')]"
    },
    "roleAssignmentId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName'))]"
    }
  }
}
